_comment: 0.7.25 — first quest in the Exeggcute / Cobbleworkers onboarding chain. Gated by BOTH beat_gym_1 AND reach_income_250 — `requirements` lists each criterion as its own inner list so both must fire. The two criteria are `minecraft:impossible` triggers fired manually from the reward functions of beat_gym_1 and reach_income_250 (see those .mcfunction files for the `advancement grant @s only server:receive_leaf_stone <criterion>` calls). Parent is reach_income_250 for tree placement; the gym_1 dependency is enforced via the criterion rather than the parent slot since vanilla advancements only support one parent.

description.text: Earn ¢250 AND defeat Gym 1 to receive a Leaf Stone.
